dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8756 IH: Countering Radicalism Under Sharia And Defeating Extremism Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moore of Alabama (for himself, Mr. Ogles, Mr. Brecheen, and Mr. Fuller) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To require certain aliens to disavow sharia law and take an oath to uphold the Constitution, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Countering Radicalism Under Sharia And Defeating Extremism Act or the CRUSADE Act.

Section 203(b)(4) of the Immigration and Nationality Act (8 U.S.C. 1153(b)(4)) is amended by inserting after the period at the end the following: To be eligible for a visa issued in accordance with this paragraph, an alien shall be required to disavow sharia law and take an oath to uphold the Constitution..
